title: Feedback Review Queue
summary: A small public view of feedback that is waiting for human review.
problem: The human feedback loop is under-covered and one human lane carries too much of the review burden.
feedbackAsk: Useful feedback says what signal would tell you this is wrong or actually held.
reviewGate: Nothing here changes direction until a human records a triage decision.

triageStates.label: Captured
triageStates.description: Feedback was recorded but has not been reviewed by a human yet.

triageStates.label: Reviewing
triageStates.description: A human is checking signal quality, scope, and relevance.

triageStates.label: Accepted
triageStates.description: The feedback is strong enough to influence the next bounded slice.

triageStates.label: Rejected
triageStates.description: The feedback is noise, drift, or outside the current problem frame.

sampleItem.report: Make the useful feedback ask explicit so viewers know what signal matters.
sampleItem.whyItMatters: Without a concrete ask, activity can look alive while signal stays weak.
sampleItem.humanDecision: Keep the first surface focused on one useful-feedback prompt and one visible triage state.
